generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we're spending billions on collective defense, some partners are cutting their own budgets. It's time to rethink how we balance national security with fair burden-sharing. #StrongerTogether #SecurityFirst
